subcategory: Article card grid with responsive columns
use_cases: Displaying blog posts in a responsive grid layout
Showcasing article collections with animated card entries
Creating content listing pages for media websites
Building news feed or editorial layouts
Organizing product or service articles in a showcase grid
ai_summary: A responsive article card grid component that displays content in a 1-3 column layout depending on screen size. Features staggered entrance animations using Framer Motion with spring-based transitions. Clean, minimalist styling with Tailwind CSS suitable for media, blogs, or content-heavy applications. Each card contains an image, title, and call-to-action link.
